title: Biome Shift
description: Ever wanted to change the biome in spots of your world? Now you can with Biome Shift!
body:
# Biome Shift
Do you want to be able to change the biome in specific parts of your world? To paint with grass textures, water color, or even leave colors? This datapack lets you do all of that.

![Biome Shift](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/82d073c1265da4ed4cdebfaec77f9c7f7e119442.png)

To swap the biome, all you need is a **Biome Shift** block. These are super easy to craft, and when placed shift the biome 10 blocks surrounding it in all directions!

There are currently 9 different choices for Biome Shifts, but that may change with updates to the pack, so make sure to follow so you don't miss them!


<details>
<summary>Crafting</summary>

Plains Biome Shift:

![Plains](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/274eeaa646111c44b20d94f219c9c45dd6c9c907.png)

![Taiga](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fcccfbbb7a9c38e4679f8830f5bcd301050c2ebe.png)

![Cherry Grove](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8f9885af043f7f6ad707010c9f4e110de5286913.png)

![Jungle](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a3bf81a6d5fea54f5abcd4ec81dfb2f23272fddc.png)
